ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lipid_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "lipid_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lipid type (e.g., DG, Cer, Chol) */,
  "mz_value" REAL /* m/z value of the lipid */,
  "retention_time" REAL /* Retention time of the lipid */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the lipid was extracted from */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument used to collect the data */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the data was uploaded */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the dataset */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lipid_datasets_lipid_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("lipid_type_id") REFERENCES lipid_types ("lipid_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lipid_datasets_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lipid_datasets_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lipid_types" (
  "lipid_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lipid type */,
  "lipid_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the lipid type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the lipid type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lipid_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of the sample (e.g., tissue, plasma) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of the instrument (e.g., mass spectrometer, NMR) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lipid_structures" (
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lipid structure */,
  "lipid_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lipid type */,
  "fatty_acid_chain" TEXT /* Fatty acid chain of the lipid */,
  "headgroup" TEXT /* Headgroup of the lipid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("structure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lipid_structures_lipid_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("lipid_type_id") REFERENCES lipid_types ("lipid_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lipid_structure_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lipid structure */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fatty_acid_chains" (
  "chain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fatty acid chain */,
  "chain_name" TEXT /* Name of the fatty acid chain */,
  "chain_length" INTEGER /* Length of the fatty acid chain */,
  "chain_type" TEXT /* Type of the fatty acid chain (e.g., saturated, unsaturated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "headgroups" (
  "headgroup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each headgroup */,
  "headgroup_name" TEXT /* Name of the headgroup */,
  "headgroup_type" TEXT /* Type of the headgroup (e.g., DG, Cer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("headgroup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lipid_quantities" (
  "quantity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quantity */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "lipid_structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lipid structure */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the lipid */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the quantity (e.g., pmol, nmol) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quantity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lipid_quantities_lipid_structure_id FOREIGN KEY ("lipid_structure_id") REFERENCES lipid_structures ("structure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lipid_quantities_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES lipid_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES lipid_datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the dataset was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotation_types" (
  "annotation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation type */,
  "annotation_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the annotation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the annotation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lipid_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "lipid_structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lipid structure */,
  "annotation_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotation type */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lipid_annotations_lipid_structure_id FOREIGN KEY ("lipid_structure_id") REFERENCES lipid_structures ("structure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lipid_pathways" (
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pathway */,
  "lipid_structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lipid structure */,
  "pathway_name" TEXT /* Name of the pathway */,
  "pathway_description" TEXT /* Description of the pathway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pathway_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lipid_pathways_lipid_structure_id FOREIGN KEY ("lipid_structure_id") REFERENCES lipid_structures ("structure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lipid_diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "lipid_structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lipid structure */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "disease_description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lipid_diseases_lipid_structure_id FOREIGN KEY ("lipid_structure_id") REFERENCES lipid_structures ("structure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lipid_references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "lipid_structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lipid structure */,
  "reference_type" TEXT /* Type of reference (e.g., publication, database) */,
  "reference_text" TEXT /* Text of the reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lipid_references_lipid_structure_id FOREIGN KEY ("lipid_structure_id") REFERENCES lipid_structures ("structure_id")
)
